doc.purpose: Brixies template catalog + curated library for the copywriter skill. Drives field_values generation when the AI drafts a section.

field_kinds.slot: A single editable field. Value type depends on `type`.
field_kinds.group: A repeatable list of items. Value is an array of objects, one per item, each containing keys defined in `item_schema`. Special shape for palette refs (see palette_groups below).

slot_types.text: Plain string. Honor `max_chars`. May carry `heading_level` (h1..h6) — the renderer wraps the value in the matching tag.
slot_types.richtext:
HTML string. Supports

, , , ,

    /
      /
    1. . Honor `max_chars` against the plain-text length, not raw HTML.
slot_types.cta: Button. Value shape: { label: string, url: string }.
slot_types.image: Image. Value shape: { src: string, alt?: string }. The copywriter typically does NOT populate images — leave empty so the placeholder shows.
slot_types.boolean: true | false. Toggles a visual variant on the section.
slot_types.form-input: A form field declaration. Rarely set by the copywriter — the renderer handles defaults.

palette_groups.detection: A group with `item_template_ref: "from_palette"` and `referenced_family` (usually "Card") is a PALETTE GROUP. Its `item_schema` is omitted because each item is rendered against the picked Card template's own `fields`.
palette_groups.value_shape: { __palette_template_id: string, items: Array<{ ...item-template fields }> }. Use the concept's `default_template_id` (or `referenced_template_id` on the group) when picking which Card variant the items render against.

doc.snippet_tokens: Strings may contain `{{token}}` literals. The renderer resolves these against a project-level snippet map (church_short_name, primary_contact_first, etc.). Copywriter may emit tokens but is not required to — literal text is fine.
doc.extras: A section's field_values may include `__overflow_html` (freehand body stash) and `__bind_report` (auto-bind diagnostics). Do not populate these — they're maintained by the binding flow.

curated_concepts.label: Header Navigation
curated_concepts.description: Primary site navigation used across all pages to guide users to key areas.

curated_concepts.label: Footer
curated_concepts.description: Global footer providing secondary navigation, legal info, and social links.

curated_concepts.label: Ministry Card
curated_concepts.description: Used in carousels or grids to highlight ministries (kids, groups, outreach, etc.).

curated_concepts.label: Staff Card
curated_concepts.description: Displays team members in grids or carousels for staff directories.

curated_concepts.label: Event Card
curated_concepts.description: Used to promote upcoming events in grids, carousels, or archive lists.

curated_concepts.label: Info Card
curated_concepts.description: General-purpose card for highlighting key information or calls-to-action.

curated_concepts.label: Sermon Card
curated_concepts.description: Displays sermons in lists or carousels for browsing content.

curated_concepts.label: Process Card
curated_concepts.description: Used to illustrate steps in a process (Next Steps, Giving, etc.).

curated_concepts.label: Written Testimonial Card
curated_concepts.description: Highlights quotes or testimonials from individuals.

curated_concepts.label: Accordion (FAQ / Expandable Content)
curated_concepts.description: Collapsible content sections used for FAQs or grouped information.

curated_concepts.label: Homepage Hero
curated_concepts.description: Primary above-the-fold section introducing the brand and guiding users to key actions.

curated_concepts.label: Inner Page Hero
curated_concepts.description: Hero used on internal pages to introduce specific sections (kids, groups, outreach).

curated_concepts.label: Featured Page Hero
curated_concepts.description: High-impact hero for key conversion pages (e.g., Plan A Visit).

curated_concepts.label: Simple CTA Banner
curated_concepts.description: Lightweight call-to-action section used between content blocks.

curated_concepts.label: Callout CTA Banner
curated_concepts.description: Prominent CTA section designed to stand out and drive conversions.

curated_concepts.label: Image Left / Text Right
curated_concepts.description: Standard content layout pairing imagery with supporting text. Pick up to 2 variants.

curated_concepts.label: Featured Content Section
curated_concepts.description: Highlights key content like events, milestones, or announcements. Pick up to 2 variants.

curated_concepts.label: Video Section
curated_concepts.description: Section dedicated to video content such as sermons or stories.

curated_concepts.label: Card Grid
curated_concepts.description: Displays multiple cards in a structured grid layout.

curated_concepts.label: Card Carousel
curated_concepts.description: Horizontally scrollable card layout for showcasing content.

curated_concepts.label: Tabbed / Nested Section
curated_concepts.description: Organizes large amounts of content into tabs or nested views.

curated_concepts.label: Unique Feature Section
curated_concepts.description: Flexible, multi-purpose layout used for custom storytelling or design needs.
includes: Combination of text, media, and CTAs depending on use case

curated_concepts.label: Team Section
curated_concepts.description: Displays staff members in a grid or carousel format.

curated_concepts.label: Filter Layout
curated_concepts.description: Archive view for browsing content (events, sermons, blog) with filtering.

curated_concepts.label: Current Series Section
curated_concepts.description: Highlights an active sermon series with related content.

curated_concepts.label: Single Event
curated_concepts.description: Detailed page for an individual event.

curated_concepts.label: Single Blog Post
curated_concepts.description: Template for blog content and articles.

curated_concepts.label: Single Staff Member
curated_concepts.description: Profile page for individual staff members.

curated_concepts.label: Single Sermon
curated_concepts.description: Detailed page for a sermon message.

curated_concepts.label: Timeline / Story Section
curated_concepts.description: Visual storytelling component used to present history or milestones.

curated_concepts.label: Video Testimonial Section
curated_concepts.description: Showcases multiple video stories for social proof.

curated_concepts.label: Written Testimonial Page
curated_concepts.description: Dedicated page for written testimonials and stories.

curated_concepts.label: Contact Section
curated_concepts.description: Provides essential contact details and ways to connect.

curated_concepts.label: Career Section
curated_concepts.description: Lists open job opportunities and role details.

item_schema.label: Stat number
item_schema.description: The big number on a stat counter card. Allows formatting like '150k+', '2,000', '500+'.
Alt-form description used by some Counter variants. Most Counters use the global `Description` slot for body copy; this entry covers the variants that named it 'Counter description' instead.

item_schema.label: Reading time
item_schema.description: E.g., '4 min read'.

item_schema.label: Reading time
item_schema.description: E.g., '4 min read'.

item_schema.label: 'View all' link
item_schema.description: Link to the full archive (e.g., 'View all posts').

item_schema.label: Role / title
item_schema.description: Alt-name for Team position. Some Brixies templates label this slot 'Position' instead of 'Team position'.

item_schema.label: Date
item_schema.description: The single authored date value. Renderer composes Day date / Day week / Month & Year subcomponents from this; strategist doesn't author the parts separately (see ignored_layer_patterns for Year / Month & Year, decorations for Day date / Day week).

item_schema.label: Address or place name
item_schema.description: Street address or venue / place name. Distinct from `Map` (the visual pin). When the value is a church address, the AI copywriter prefers the `{{church_address}}` merge field.

item_schema.label: Featured image
item_schema.description: Lead image on a detail page (post / event / team).
